news.headline: Taiwan hits back at Beijing’s ‘cognitive warfare’ after coastguard patrols
news.summary:
Taiwan has accused Beijing of escalating tensions after mainland Chinese coastguard and survey vessels carried out law-enforcement operations in waters off the island’s east coast.
Over the weekend, mainland China’s transport ministry announced a “special maritime traffic law enforcement operation”

news.headline: China’s C919 jet poised to tackle ageing domestic fleet: industry official
news.summary:
China’s massive civil aviation fleet is ageing faster than planes are being replaced, threatening to saddle airlines with higher costs, but orders for home-grown C919 jets could help stem the tide, according to the head of north Asia for the International Air Transport Association (IATA).

news.headline: Video: Israel claims strike on Iranian petrochemical complex
news.summary: Video shows plumes of smoke rising from Mahshahr Petrochemical Complex in Iran’s Khuzestan Province on Monday.

news.headline: Hong Kong data centres outpace global average for carbon footprint: UN study
news.summary:
Hong Kong ranks among the world’s largest data centre hubs but has a carbon footprint exceeding the global average, a United Nations think tank study has found, urging a responsible strategy to tackle the “unintended impacts” of using artificial intelligence (AI).
